ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Maximum amount the insurance will cover for this benefit */,
  "is_network_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the benefit requires a network provider */,
  "is_pre_authorization_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if pre-authorization is required for the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., preventive care, emergency care) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Maximum amount the insurance will cover for this service */,
  "is_network_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the service requires a network provider */,
  "is_pre_authorization_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if pre-authorization is required for the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., surgical, diagnostic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the insurance plan */,
  "annual_premium" REAL /* Annual premium for the insurance plan */,
  "is_hsa_eligible" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the plan is eligible for a Health Savings Account (HSA) */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of plan (e.g., HMO, PPO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefit_cost_shares" (
  "cost_share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost-share entry */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance plan */,
  "cost_share_amount" REAL /* Cost-share amount for the benefit and plan */,
  "cost_share_type" TEXT /* Type of cost-sharing (e.g., copay, coinsurance) */,
  "cost_share_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the cost-share if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefit_cost_shares_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES insurance_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefit_cost_shares_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deductibles" (
  "deductible_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deductible entry */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance plan */,
  "deductible_amount" REAL /* Deductible amount for the benefit and plan */,
  "deductible_type" TEXT /* Type of deductible (e.g., individual, family) */,
  "is_annual_reset" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the deductible resets annually */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deductible_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deductibles_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deductibles_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES insurance_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network provider */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance plan */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the network provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of network provider (e.g., primary care physician, specialist) */,
  "provider_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the provider */,
  "provider_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider (e.g., cardiology, pediatrics) */,
  "provider_location" TEXT /* Location of the provider */,
  "is_in_network" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the provider is in-network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_providers_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES insurance_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical facility */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network provider */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of medical facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "facility_address" TEXT /* Address of the medical facility */,
  "facility_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the medical facility */,
  "facility_email" TEXT /* Email address of the medical facility */,
  "facility_website" TEXT /* Website of the medical facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_facilities_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES network_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance plan */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the patient is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES insurance_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was submitted */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "claim_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the claim */,
  "claim_submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who submitted the claim */,
  "claim_processed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who processed the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_status_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card) */,
  "payment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)
